title: navarretia parviflora
intro: Navarretia parviflora, also known as the small-flowered navarretia or small-flowered clarkia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family, commonly found in the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Navarretia parviflora include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Navarretia parviflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
